metadata.name: Simulate Blast Radius in Digital Twin

description: In a training exercise, an emergency planner wants to simulate the impact of an explosion at a chemical plant to plan for evacuations.

nodes.task_description: Select the chemical plant's location in the digital twin.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the point of origin for the simulation.

nodes.task_description: Run a blast radius and plume model simulation based on the type and amount of chemicals stored at the plant.

expected_outcome.value: The system generates a map showing the potential impact zones for the explosion and subsequent chemical cloud.

nodes.task_description: Identify all residential buildings, schools, and hospitals within the simulated impact zones.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a list of critical facilities that would need to be evacuated.
